description: The DKC (Dunning-Kruger Coding) detection ruleset. 56 rules across 7 weighted categories that identify code shipped without adequate understanding. Severity is derived from category weight: comment forensics and LLM fingerprints (0.10) lean medium, dependency and developer-experience signals (0.12-0.13) lean high, infrastructure (0.18) and security anti-patterns (0.25) lean critical, social/meta signals (0.07) lean low. Final score is domain-adjusted by application context.
name: VantaCode DKC Rules
